block_01: Chritsmats ke utsav ke kaaran, 20 disambar, 2019 ko meree paaree 11.30 PM to 8.30 PM ke bajaay  11.30 PM se 7.30 PM tak hogee.
block_02: isake alaava, 25, 26 December, 2019 aur 1 January 2020 ko Bank kee chhuttiyaan hain isalie main kaam nahin karoongi.
block_03: Agar aapako eske dauraan kisee bhee tarah kee madad kee aavashyakata ho, poore avakaash kee avadhi mein support aapako 24/7 kee sahaayata karane mein saksham hoga. 2 January 2020 se hamare saadhaaran working hours suru ho jayege.
block_04: meree Chritsmats aur nave varsh kee haardik shubhakaamanaen! maee 2020 aapake lie svaasthy, khushee aur nae avasar lekar aae!
